## Summary

Brief description of the change and what problem it solves.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / DevOps

## Testing

- [ ] TypeScript compiles (`bun run typecheck`)
- [ ] Client builds (`cd client && bun run build`)
- [ ] Tested locally with `bun run dev`

## Screenshots

If UI change, add screenshots showing before/after.

## Additional Notes

Anything reviewers should know.
